# Quadratic equation factorization

## Short Teaching Summary
Quadratic equation factorization: For the equation x² – 7x + 12 = 0, the factorization is (x – 3)(x – 4) = 0, leading to solutions x = 3, 4. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
